summary: Add post-commit synthesis trigger to learning-gate.mjs. After validation passes, automatically re-runs synthesize-meta-kb.mjs to keep the index fresh. Guards against circular amplification by skipping synthesis if source is meta-kb-auto.
root_cause: Task 10: Post-commit synthesis hook not implemented
fix_approach: Added triggerMetaKBSynthesis function that imports synthesize from synthesize-meta-kb.mjs and calls it after learning update validation passes. Guard checks for source: meta-kb-auto to prevent circular amplification.

validation.notes: Function added, script runs without syntax errors
